name: JellyPlug Cache Headers
description: Long-lived Cache-Control on the version-busted /JavaScriptInjector/*.js, 1h + ETag on /Branding/Css, and high-quality brotli/gzip so wire size beats the server's on-the-fly compression.
overview: Makes JellyPlug's heavy CSS/JS assets cacheable so the app loads fast on reload.

versions.changelog: 1.1.0.0 (JELA-76): ?v=-busted /JavaScriptInjector/*.js now max-age=604800 immutable; /Branding/Css public, max-age=3600 + ETag (URL has no cache-buster in jellyfin-web); middleware now compresses itself (brotli q11 / gzip 9, cached per content version) instead of the server's Fastest-level on-the-fly compression.
1.0.0.0 (JEL-659): stamp ETag + Cache-Control on the two uncached JellyPlug assets and answer conditional GETs with 304.
